PeriodID.description: The unique ID associated of this period

GameID.description: The unique ID of this game tied to this period

Name.description: The name of the period (possible values: 1; 2; 3; SO; OT; OT2; OT3; OT4; etc)

AwayScore.description: Total goals scored by the away team in a given period

HomeScore.description: Total goals scored by the home team in the period

ScoringPlays.description: The details of the scoring plays that occurred during this period

Penalties.description: The details of the penalties that occurred during this period
